items.title: Lachy Groom to back India startup Pronto at a $200M valuation, sources say
items.summary: This round, should it occur, would double the house-help startup's valuation in a matter of weeks.

items.title: Steve Ballmer blasts founder he backed who pleaded guilty to fraud: ‘I was duped and feel silly’
items.summary: Steve Ballmer wrote a fiery letter in the sentencing of disgraced founder Joseph Sanberg documenting all the harm that's befalling him as an investor.

items.title: Palantir is reportedly helping the IRS investigate financial crimes
items.summary: The IRS has used Palantir's software since at least 2018, The Intercept reports.

items.title: Cohere acquires, merges with Germany-based startup to create a ‘transatlantic AI powerhouse’
items.summary: Cohere, the Canada-based AI company that makes AI tools for businesses in regulated industries, announced Friday it would merge with Aleph Alpha, a German company that also builds AI systems for businesses and governments.

items.title: Two college kids raise a $5.1 million pre-seed to build an AI social network in iMessage
items.summary: Series, a social networking app that's grown popular on college campuses, announced a $5.1 million pre-seed round from some big names in tech.

items.title: Meta’s loss is Thinking Machines’ gain
items.summary: Meta has been poaching talent from Thinking Machines Lab. But it's a two-way street.

items.title: X-energy stock pops 27% on first day of trading following upsized IPO
items.summary: Investors flocked to nuclear power startup X-energy in its first day of public trading on the Nasdaq.

items.title: ComfyUI hits $500M valuation as creators seek more control over AI-generated media
items.summary: ComfyUI, whose tools give creators more control over AI image, video, and audio generation, just raised $30 million.

items.title: X launches stand-alone XChat app on iOS
items.summary: X's new app promises private chats, disappearing messages, audio and video calls, and more.

items.title: Google to invest up to $40B in Anthropic in cash and compute
items.summary: Google plans up to $40B investment in Anthropic as AI rivals race to secure massive compute capacity, following the limited release of its powerful, cybersecurity-focused Mythos model.

items.title: Marked-up Mac minis flood eBay amid shortages driven by AI
items.summary: Apple’s sold-out Mac mini is spawning marked-up eBay listings as demand surges for the compact desktop, now favored for running local AI models and tools.

items.title: Nuclear startup X-energy raises $1B in data center-driven IPO
items.summary: Amazon-backed X-energy was able to raise around 20% more money in its IPO as demand for nuclear power surges.

items.title: Another spyware maker caught distributing fake Android snooping apps
items.summary: Researchers have found a new case where government authorities used a fake Android app to plant spyware on a target’s phone. The company that allegedly developed the spyware was not previously known to sell this type of software.

items.title: Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga joins stacked StrictlyVC SF lineup for April 30 event
items.summary: Surprise! StrictlyVC San Francisco, which will kick off this year’s events lineup for TechCrunch on April 30 at the Sentro Filipino Cultural Center, is getting a new addition to its increasingly stacked lineup of speakers. Uber CTO Praveen Neppalli Naga will join the rest of the lineup to discuss operating at scale in the age of AI.

items.title: Tim Cook is stepping down. What happens to Apple now?
items.summary: Tim Cook plans to step down from his CEO role in September, handing the reins to hardware chief John Ternus.   Ternus may be inheriting one of the most durable businesses in tech, but he’s also stepping into a very different ecosystemthan the one Cook spent decades shaping. The App Store’s 30% cut is under pressure, the behind-the-scenes power Apple once […]

items.title: Nothing introduces an AI-powered dictation tool
items.summary: Nothing's new on-device dictation tool supports over 100 languages.

items.title: DeepSeek previews new AI model that ‘closes the gap’ with frontier models
items.summary: DeepSeek says both models are more efficient and performant than DeepSeek V3.2 due to architectural improvements, and have almost "closed the gap" with current leading models, both open and closed, on reasoning benchmarks.

items.title: In another wild turn for AI chips, Meta signs deal for millions of Amazon AI CPUs
items.summary: Meta has commandeered a big chunk of Amazon's homegrown CPUs (not GPUs) for AI agentic workloads, signaling that a new kind of chip race has begun.

items.title: Porsche is adding an all-electric Cayenne coupe to its lineup
items.summary: Porsche will start selling the Cayenne Coupe Electric in late summer.

items.title: Bob Iger rejoins Thrive Capital as advisor after Disney exit
items.summary: The former Disney CEO hold a stake in Thrive and has previously held the role of the venture partner at the firm.
